meta.sunshine: HRS §92-7 · agendas post ≥6 days before a meeting
meta.producer: council-watch (Hawaiʻi County · sample — swap for live Granicus ingest)

agendas.title: Dept of Water Supply — system capital plan

conflicts.title: Lava Zone rebuild policy
conflicts.against: HCC Ch.25 zoning · HRS Ch.127A · Civil Defense
conflicts.desc: Rebuild entitlements in Lava Flow Hazard Zones 1–2 weighed against hazard-mitigation duties. Framed as a question of risk vs. kuleana to place — needs the policy text.

conflicts.title: Puna geothermal relicensing
conflicts.desc: Community-benefit and cultural-review questions surface in relicensing. Correlations between operator and approvals are questions for testimony, not findings.

conflicts.title: Vacation-rental zoning
conflicts.desc: STVR caps in Puna/Kona crossed against housing availability and the General Plan. Open question pending the draft bill.
